text_original: This app is PG 16 so get the adult content back please...
text_zh: 这个应用是PG 16，所以请把成人内容放回来吧……
reply_original: Thanks for the 4 stars! We understand your frustration. To keep Fantasia available on Google Play, we must strictly follow their platform policies regarding explicit content. We're doing our best to keep the stories exciting within these rules! For any suggestions or feedback, please reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 感谢您的4星好评！我们理解您的沮丧。为了让 Fantasia 保持在 Google Play 上架，我们必须严格遵守他们关于露骨内容的平台政策。我们正尽最大努力在这些规则范围内保持故事的精彩！如有任何建议或反馈，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。
